findingVerification.notes: The benchmark warden.toml explicitly sets defaults.verification.enabled = true.

traceCapture.notes: Run used --traces on all shards. Failed provider/extraction records were repaired with traced targeted reruns before aggregation.

notes: Full benchmark result stitched from one Warden run per corpus SHA using --runtime pi --model openrouter/deepseek/deepseek-v4-pro --effort xhigh --traces. Each shard analyzes every unique corpus path for that SHA, not the whole Sentry repository. The 7f41cc50 and 9fc06de5 shards required targeted repair reruns after provider/extraction failures; the committed aggregate includes only clean traced records plus the repair costs needed to make those shards complete. Earlier abandoned failed attempts are excluded. Raw JSONL artifacts are withheld pending sensitive-data review; committed traceSummaries retain sanitized per-chunk metadata only.

scoring.notes: Agent-verified semantic matches. A finding counts when it identifies the same bug in roughly the same location as an existing corpus finding. Same-file findings about different bugs do not count; duplicate findings map to one unique corpus ID.

scores.notes: Internal EA features endpoint auth bypass.
OAuth userinfo inactive-user/app bypass.
Finds cleartext option logging on an earlier shard, not the 2d allowlist-comma corpus bug.
Accept-invite token validation/delete fall-through.
OAuth app client secret exposed to non-owner grantees.
Timing-unsafe compare finding is not the Statsig timestamp freshness corpus bug.
Validated Jira Server webhook JWT logged.
Release webhook token uses uuid1.
Organization-level Seer RPC skips project access.
Seer RPC HMAC omits URL binding.
External issue action host injection is not the corpus event-scope bug.
Jira JQL autocomplete escapes quotes but not backslashes.
Copy-as-curl escapes values but not header names.
Feature flag ECharts tooltip XSS.
Codecov token regeneration accepts org:read.
Discover saved-query visit skips object permissions.
External team lookup scopes only by org.
Unlink identity deletes by external_id without ownership.
Shared Slack-channel unlink authorization issue is not in the corpus.
Perforce config data exposes password.
Slack options load leaks cross-org teams/users.
Metric-alert team target lookup is unscoped.
Preprod artifact approval misses project access.
Data export notification endpoint lacks PubSub verification.
Seer autofix run_id is not bound to group.
Sentry App issue-action SSRF/host injection is not the corpus event JSON access bug.
Sentry App cell service user optionality drops project access.
Duplicate adjacent-chunk report for the same cell-service corpus bug.
Workflow connection auth issue differs from the corpus disconnect-permission bug.
System options PUT logs cleartext credential values.
